name: components/tanstack-table
description: A headless table component built on @tanstack/solid-table that provides pre-wired primitives for sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, grouping, and faceted values. Exports createSolidTable, flexRender, and all built-in row-model helpers (getCoreRowModel, getFilteredRowModel, getSortedRowModel, getPaginationRowModel, getGroupedRowModel, getExpandedRowModel, and faceted-value helpers) alongside reusable UI sub-components such as DataTable, DataTablePagination, DataTableToolbar, DataTableViewOptions, and DataTableColumnHeader.
useCases: Admin dashboards with client-side sorted/filtered tables under 10,000 rows
Data-exploration interfaces combining column filters, faceted unique-value badges, and pagination
Row-selection grids for bulk operations (delete, export, assign) with controlled checkboxes
Expandable grouped tables that collapse/expand category summaries with nested detail rows
usage: import { DataTable, DataTablePagination, DataTableToolbar, DataTableViewOptions, DataTableColumnHeader, createSolidTable, flexRender } from "shadcn-solid-components/components/tanstack-table"
